prompt: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a quiet rural Japanese train station platform in bright summer daylight, with a full-body young woman in the foreground wearing a classic black-and-white Victorian maid dress. She stands slightly left of center on the platform, facing forward, holding out both sides of her skirt in a formal curtsy-like pose. Her outfit includes a black long-sleeved dress with white frilled trim, a large white apron, a white ruffled maid headband, white cuffs, white petticoat layers peeking from under the skirt, white socks, and black Mary Jane shoes. Use dark brown hair, straight and long with soft bangs. Her face should be obscured with a soft blurred mosaic block, as if anonymized. Behind her, on the nearest track, place an older cream-colored local train with a bold blue horizontal stripe, viewed from the front at a slight angle, with a destination sign reading "普通". On the right-side track, place a second train: a bright yellow local train farther back, also with "普通" on the front. Show 2 trains total. The station is an open-air, slightly nostalgic Japanese platform with overhead electrical lines, steel gantries, weathered wooden roofing, concrete platform edges, and yellow tactile paving. On the left, include a large station sign reading "のの", "Nono", and "福岡県福岡市", with directional arrows and the two destination labels "博多 Hakata" and "天神 Tenjin". Also show 2 platform number signs: "1 のりば" above the foreground platform and "2 のりば" on the opposite platform. Add small flowers near the base of the station sign, warm sunlight, crisp shadows, blue sky, and fluffy white summer clouds. Composition should feel like a polished slice-of-life anime background illustration with realistic rail details, clean linework, soft painterly shading, and a slightly nostalgic, cinematic mood.
